name: Gross Written Loss Ratio
formula: (SUM(Gross Incurred Claim) / SUM(Gross Written Premium)) * 100

name: Net Written Loss Ratio
formula: (SUM(Net Incurred Claim) / SUM(Net Written Premium)) * 100

name: Gross Earned Loss Ratio
formula: (SUM(Gross Incurred Claim) / SUM(Gross Earned Premium)) * 100

name: Net Earned Loss Ratio
formula: (SUM(Net Incurred Claim) / SUM(Net Earned Premium)) * 100

name: Gross Paid Loss Ratio
formula: (SUM(Gross Paid Claim) / SUM(Gross Earned Premium)) * 100

name: Net Paid Loss Ratio
formula: (SUM(Net Paid Claim) / SUM(Net Earned Premium)) * 100

name: Gross Written Premium Growth
formula: ((SUM(Gross Written Premium CY) - SUM(Gross Written Premium PY)) / SUM(Gross Written Premium PY)) * 100

name: Gross Written Premium Achievement
formula: (SUM(Gross Written Premium CY) / SUM(Gross Written Premium Budget CY)) * 100

name: Retention Ratio
formula: (SUM(Net Written Premium) / SUM(Gross Written Premium)) * 100

name: Number of Policies Renewal Ratio
formula: (SUM(Renewed No of Policies) / SUM(Renewable No of Policies)) * 100

name: Gross Written Premium Renewal Ratio
formula: (SUM(Renewed Gross Written Premium) / SUM(Renewable Gross Written Premium)) * 100

name: Gross Commission Ratio
formula: (SUM(Gross Commission) / SUM(Gross Earned Premium)) * 100

name: Net Commission Ratio
formula: (SUM(Net Commission) / SUM(Net Earned Premium)) * 100

name: Combined Ratio Prior to Expense
formula: (Net Earned Loss Ratio + Net Commission Ratio)

name: Incurred Frequency
formula: SUM(No of Claims) / SUM(No of Policies)

name: Paid Frequency
formula: SUM(No of Claims Paid) / SUM(No of Policies)

name: Incurred Severity
formula: SUM(Gross Incurred Claims) / SUM(No of Claims)

name: Paid Severity
formula: SUM(Gross Paid Claim) / SUM(No of Claims Paid)

name: Written Average Premium
formula: SUM(Gross Written Premium) / SUM(No of Policies)

name: Earned Average Premium
formula: SUM(Gross Earned Premium) / SUM(No of Policies)

name: Incurred Burning Cost
formula: Incurred Frequency * Incurred Severity

name: Paid Burning Cost
formula: Paid Frequency * Paid Severity
